subcodes.first_line: God, verily, hath heard the cry of such as have disputed His Cause, denied His signs, and turned away from His manifest proof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع الله ندآء الذینهم جادلوا فی امره و کفروا بایاته و اعرضوا عن حجه التی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
